scope.target: Define when agents must create workflow artifacts proactively.
scope.dependency_radius: Workflow creation and task tracking behavior.
constraints: Must not force workflows for trivial single-file changes.
Must trigger workflows for source-of-truth restructuring and multi-stage governance work.
non_goals: Do not replace task JSON status rules.

user_constraints: Workflow should not depend only on explicit user requests.

steps: Update agents.md with concise mandatory trigger guidance.
validation: Ensure direct mode remains available for small work.
